pcaconnectorad.template.extensionsv3.Cfn: Certificate extensions for v3 template schema

pcaconnectorad.template.extensionsv3.App.Description: Application policies specify what the certificate is used for and its purpose.

pcaconnectorad.template.extensionsv3.Key.Description: The key usage extension defines the purpose (e.g., encipherment, signature, certificate signing) of the key contained in the certificate.
